title: bebbia juncea
intro: Bebbia juncea, also known as California fleabane, is a shrubby plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bebbia juncea include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Bebbia juncea is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
